_readme: Human-verified facts that automated scraping cannot reach (primarily Vaughan, whose site blocks all automated clients). Applied by scraper/main.py AFTER the candidate fetch on every run, so they always win and survive scraper changes. Each override needs provenance: who verified it, when, and against what source. Entries with "new_candidate": true INSERT a candidate that no scraper can see (e.g. Vaughan at-large challengers) — their "fields" must be a complete candidate record; entries without it PATCH an existing candidate by candidate_id.

overrides.verified_by: verified against Vaughan's official Candidates page; news coverage of his campaign launch on nomination-opening day, e.g. westernstandard.news 2026-05-01 'Del Duca enters 2026 Vaughan mayoral race'
Claude read Vaughan's official Candidates page (Nominated Candidates > Local and Regional Councillor) via the Claude-for-Chrome extension; filing date now captured
